title: Set Hearing Status - Bulk Processing: verify 'hearingstatus' code (Apply to This Hearing)

summary: v2 is based on ECORE-6912 Codes used are deactivated per SEACMS-3897> Moving to retired folder

steps.action: Select 2 cases/hearings. Tap C keyboard button
steps.expected: The Code Tray appears

steps.expected: Future hearings are added to each case/hearing

steps.action: Close the Code Tray. Click on Actions button bottom right. Click on Bulk Processing button
steps.expected: Bulk Processing screen is open. Selected hearings are presented on the screen

steps.action: Click on Add Action button. Enter and select 'hearingstatus' code
steps.expected: Code Drawer for Set Hearing Status Action appears. Action Interface contains Status* and Applies To* fields. No default values associated with this code.

steps.action: Populate the required fields (Applies To = This Hearing). Click on Save (tick) button
steps.expected: Success banner is displayed. Code Drawer is not closed.

steps.action: Close the Code Tray. Navigate to Minute Order tab for each modified hearing
steps.expected: The added action is displayed on Minute Order tab. Text column for appropriate action is populated "Status for This Hearing set to [[NewStatus]]".

steps.expected: Hearing Status is updated only for the current hearing associated to modified cases/hearings
